exchanges.prompt: Design a multi-cloud architecture using AWS S3 for storage, Azure Functions for compute, and GCP BigQuery for analytics with a Kubernetes orchestration layer

response.content:
graph TD
    subgraph Kubernetes Cluster
        K8sOrchestrationLayer[Kubernetes Orchestration Layer]
    end
    subgraph AWS
        AWSS3[AWS S3 Storage]
    end
    subgraph Azure
        AzureFunctions[Azure Functions Compute]
    end
    subgraph GCP
        GCPBigQuery[GCP BigQuery Analytics]
    end
    K8sOrchestrationLayer -->|orchestration| AWSS3
    K8sOrchestrationLayer -->|orchestration| AzureFunctions
    K8sOrchestrationLayer -->|orchestration| GCPBigQuery
    AzureFunctions -->|data processing| GCPBigQuery
    AWSS3 -->|data storage| AzureFunctions
    GCPBigQuery -->|data analytics| K8sOrchestrationLayer
    AzureFunctions -.--> K8sOrchestrationLayer
    AWSS3 -.--> K8sOrchestrationLayer
    GCPBigQuery -.--> K8sOrchestrationLayer
